disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, severe, sharp lower-abdominal pain of instantaneous onset about 30 minutes ago, worse on the left
trigger_question_examples: What happened right before she collapsed?
Where is the pain and how did it start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She was fine, then out of nowhere she got this agonising sharp pain low in her belly, mostly on the left, and started screaming.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain referred to the tip of the left shoulder immediately before collapse
trigger_question_examples: Did she complain of pain anywhere else?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — just before she went down she grabbed her left shoulder and said the tip of it was killing her.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A fainting episode with ongoing drowsiness and confusion after the pain started
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She fainted right after the pain hit, and now she's really groggy and confused — she can't answer me properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several days of abnormal dark vaginal spotting preceding today
trigger_question_examples: Has she had any vaginal bleeding recently?
Any changes down below in the last few days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She did mention some dark spotting for the last two or three days — not like her normal period.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Her last monthly period was late / missed
trigger_question_examples: Could she be pregnant, or is her period late?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I think she said her period was late this month — she was a bit worried about it.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not really sure about her cycle, but she did say it was overdue.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: She appears very pale, cold, sweaty and clammy since collapsing
trigger_question_examples: What does she look like right now?
Is her skin pale or sweaty?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's gone really pale, almost grey, and her skin is cold and sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Her abdomen looks distended and she flinches when it is touched
trigger_question_examples: Does she react if you touch her tummy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her tummy looks bloated and she flinches or groans if I go anywhere near it.
